It is primarily intended for refilling or extracting operating fluids from external containers or reservoirs in various machines and equipment. The set contains two hoses with lengths of 190 mm and 197 mm with diameters of 5/16'' and 1/4''. The piston is equipped with a seal made of high-quality rubber that is resistant to long-term contact with oil and grease. All seals are manufactured with maximum precision and allow working even at high pressure. The extractor is equipped with a venting system that equalizes the pressure under the piston, ensuring smooth and efficient operation. The semi-transparent cylinder makes it easy to check the quantity and condition of the liquid.
